name: Brussels Sprouts in Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the Brussels Sprouts in 1/2 cup of chicken broth; cover and set aside.
2. Spray a small skillet with vegetable cooking spray and add the oil.
3. Saute the onion in the oil until softened, then remove from the heat.
4. Slowly add the 1 cup of chicken broth to the sauteed onions.
5. Stir in the mustard and pepper.
6. Return the skillet to the heat and dissolve the cornstarch in the evaporated milk.
7. Gradually stir the cornstarch mixture into the skillet, constantly cooking until the sauce is smooth and thickened, about 5 minutes.
8. Pour the mustard sauce over the cooked Brussels Sprouts and stir to coat.
9. Serve immediately.
